visitday: Number of days since baseline scan
EXP_LEADUP: In the days leading up to the psilocybin administration I felt…
EXP_ARRIVALFEEL: When I arrived at the research centre my feelings were…
EXP_ARRIVALSTAFF: When I arrived at the research centre my feelings and impressions about the staff were…
EXP_INITIALEFFECTS: As I started to feel the effects of the psilocybin, my emotions were…
EXP_MRIEMOTIONS: During the MRI my emotions were…
EXP_EEGEMOTIONS: During the EEG my emotions were…
EXP_INTEREST: The most interesting part was _______ (onset, MRI, EEG, after). This was the most interesting part because…
EXP_MUSIC: I felt the music throughout the experience…
EXP_GUIDES: I felt ________________ about the guides I had with me.
EXP_LEADUPANXIETY_1: Please rate your level of anxiety in the days leading up to the psilocybin day (0 = very low, 100 = very high)
EXP_ADMINANXPT1: Did you experience anxiety on the day of psilocybin administration?
EXP_LEADUPANXPT2_1: — - When you arrived at the research centre
EXP_LEADUPANXPT2_2: — - When you were administered the psilocybin
EXP_LEADUPANXPT2_3: — - When you were escorted to the MRI room
EXP_LEADUPANXPT3: Can you recall the cause and describe the experience of anxiety (e.g., how did you manage it)?
EXP_CHALLENGEPT1: Did you encounter other challenging experiences?
EXP_CHALLENGEPT3: When did they occur? (e.g., onset, MRI, EEG)
EXP_CHALLENGEPT4: Did anything help you find your way through the challenges?
EXP_INTENSITYPOINT: You may have experienced a point of greatest intensity from the effects of psilocybin. If so,  where were you? (e.g., onset room, MRI, EEG)
EXP_INTENSITYEXP: How intense would you rate the psilocybin experience? - 1
EXP_INTENSITYFEEL: How did you feel about the intensity? Was it too much or too little?
EXP_SUBSIDE: Where were you when the effects began to noticeably subside? (e.g., MRI, EEG, return to the  administration room)
EXP_VISUALPT1: Did you have an altered visual experience?
EXP_VISUALPT2: If yes, please describe your visual experience and note where you were (e.g., onset, MRI, EEG) at each stage.
EXP_TIME: Did your sense of time change? Did it slow down or speed up? In your description, please note where you were (e.g., onset, MRI, EEG) at each each stage.
EXP_SYNAESTHESIA:
Synaesthesia is described as experiencing one of your senses through another or having one of your senses control the response of another. For example, the music your hear may influence visual hallucinations. 

Did you experience synaesthesia? If yes, please describe your experience of synaesthesia and note where you were (e.g. onset, MRI, EEG) at each stage.
EXP_AMAZEMENT: Was the experience among the most interesting or most amazing in your life? If yes, which? Please describe how.
EXP_FINDMEANING: Did you find meaning in your experience? If yes, please describe how.
EXP_MOSTMEANING_PT1: Would you rate the experience among the “most meaningful and spiritually significant  experiences of your life?”
EXP_MOSTMEANING_PT2: Where would you rate the experience among the “most meaningful and spiritually  significant experiences of your life?” - 1
EXP_MINDSET_PATIENCE:
Please remark on the mindset qualities that you notice have changed since the psilocybin experience.
Please note: The scale of this measure is -100 to +100. Any score below 0 means you experienced a negative change for the item after psilocybin. A middle score of 0 means no change. Any score above 0 means a positive change for the item after psilocybin. - Patience

Please remark on the mindset qualities that you notice have changed since the psilocybin experience.

EXP_COMMENTS: Is there anything else you would like to add?
INTERACT_GUIDES: The interactions with the research team or guides?
INTERACT_SETTING_1: The research setting. - The main session room (where you were were administered psilocybin)
INTERACT_SETTING_2: The research setting. - The MRI room
INTERACT_SETTING_3: The research setting. - The  EEG room
INTERACT_MRIVIDEO: The video played during MRI (Note: Please provide detailed feedback on your experience during the clouds video watching in the MRI).
INTERACT_MRISURVEY: Completing the questionnaires taken immediately after the MRI, before EEG setup (i.e., these were the clouds, ego dissolution and music questionnaires).
PART3_EEGMUSICSETUP: The music/video played during EEG setup.
INTERACT_DEPTH: Did you experience emotional depth during the psilocybin experience?
INTERACT_CHANGE: Do you feel changed by the experience? If yes, how are you changed? Please describe the experience that changed you (thoughts, perceptions, visions, etc.).
INTERACT_NIGHTOF: How did you feel the night you left the psilocybin session?
INTERACT_THOUGHTS: Did you notice any changes in your thinking?
INTERACT_SLEEP: How was your sleep that night?
INTERACT_DAYSELAPSED: How many days has it been since your psilocybin session?
INTERACT_ENERGY: How is your focus and energy level today?
INTEGRATE_BODY: How did you feel inside your body? Think about your connection to your senses, any physical  changes you noticed, or maybe how your felt about your body.
INTEGRATE_EMOTION: What emotions did you feel (e.g., sadness, grief, anger, fear, jealousy, joy, gratitude,  frustration, anxiety)?
INTEGRATE_THOUGHTS: What did you think about during the experience?
INTEGRATE_PATTERNS: Did you see any patterns about yourself and your behavior?
INTEGRATE_INSIGHTS: Relatedly, did you come away with any new insights about yourself, the way you act, or the  world around you?
INTEGRATE_CLARIFY: Is there anything that you feel the need to clarify with the facilitators, group members, sitter,  or whoever was with you for the experience?
INTEGRATE_INTERSTING: Did anything else happen that was interesting to you or that you would like to discuss?
INTEGRATE_NEEDED: Do you have an opinion on what else you might have needed or might have been useful in  preparation for the psilocybin experience? If so, what?
INTEGRATE_DRUGUSE: Did you use any recreational drugs / plant medicines during the course of the study (apart  from the psilocybin provided)?
INTEGRATE_COMMENTS: Is there anything else you would like to add?
MEDITATION_COURSE_INTEREST: Please rate the 8-week meditation course on: - Interest
MEDITATION_COURSE_USEFUL: Please rate the 8-week meditation course on: - Useful to the psilocybin session
MEDITATION_MINDSET: Did you utilize any of the mindsets, ideas or exercises that were developed as part of the  meditation training or theory session during the psilocybin experience? If so, please identify  which aspect and how?
MEDITATION_CHALLENGE: Do you feel meditation training helped overcome challenges experienced before or during the  psilocybin experience? If so, how?
MEDITATION_POSITIVE: Do you feel meditation enhanced positive emotions during the psilocybin experience? If so,  how?
MEDITATION_DEPTH: Do you feel meditation enhanced the depth of the psychedelic experience? If so, how?
MEDITATION_WORSE: Did mediation or the mindfulness teaching worsen any part of the experience or make any part of the experience difficult? If so, how?
MEDITATION_COMMENTS: Please share any additional thoughts about how meditation interacted with your psychedelic  experience. Please be as specific as possible.
MEDITATION_CHANGES: Has the quality of your meditation practice changed since the psilocybin experience? If so, please describe what changes you have noticed about your practice (e.g., depth of meditation,  sense of connectedness, etc.)?
